

```{r}

# Competencia SalePrice 


library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(glmnet)
library(xgboost)
library(forcats)

# 1. Cargar datasets
train <- read.csv("data_train_v3.csv")
test  <- read.csv("test_v3.csv")

# 2. Preprocesamiento
categorical_vars <- sapply(train, is.character)
train[categorical_vars] <- lapply(train[categorical_vars], factor)
test[categorical_vars]  <- lapply(test[categorical_vars], factor)

# Imputar valores faltantes
for (col in names(train)) {
  if (is.numeric(train[[col]])) {
    train[[col]][is.na(train[[col]])] <- median(train[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}
for (col in names(test)) {
  if (is.numeric(test[[col]])) {
    test[[col]][is.na(test[[col]])] <- median(test[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

train <- train %>% mutate_if(is.factor, ~fct_explicit_na(., "None"))
test  <- test %>% mutate_if(is.factor, ~fct_explicit_na(., "None"))

# 3. Unificar niveles de factores entre train y test
for (col in names(train)) {
  if (is.factor(train[[col]]) && col %in% names(test)) {
    niveles <- union(levels(train[[col]]), levels(test[[col]]))
    train[[col]] <- factor(train[[col]], levels = niveles)
    test[[col]]  <- factor(test[[col]], levels = niveles)
  }
}

# 4. Eliminar columnas inútiles
nzv <- nearZeroVar(train, saveMetrics = TRUE)
train <- train[, !nzv$zeroVar]
test  <- test[, names(test) %in% names(train)]

# 5. Configuración de validación cruzada
set.seed(123)
ctrl <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)

# 6. Modelos con caret
lm_fit <- train(SalePrice ~ ., data=train, method="lm", trControl=ctrl,
                preProcess=c("center","scale"))

glmnet_fit <- train(SalePrice ~ ., data=train, method="glmnet", trControl=ctrl,
                    tuneLength=3, preProcess=c("center","scale"))

rf_fit <- train(SalePrice ~ ., data=train, method="rf", trControl=ctrl,
                tuneLength=2)

results <- resamples(list(LM=lm_fit, RidgeLasso=glmnet_fit, RF=rf_fit))
print(summary(results))

# 7. XGBoost manual con columnas alineadas
common_cols <- intersect(names(train), names(test))
train_aligned <- train[, c(common_cols, "SalePrice")]
test_aligned  <- test[, common_cols]

# Forzar que test tenga todas las columnas de train
missing_cols <- setdiff(names(train_aligned), names(test_aligned))
for (col in missing_cols) {
  test_aligned[[col]] <- NA
}

# Crear variables dummy
dummies <- dummyVars(SalePrice ~ ., data=train_aligned)
train_xgb <- data.frame(predict(dummies, newdata=train_aligned))
train_xgb$SalePrice <- train_aligned$SalePrice
test_xgb <- data.frame(predict(dummies, newdata=test_aligned))

# Entrenar XGBoost
dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data=as.matrix(train_xgb %>% select(-SalePrice)),
                      label=train_xgb$SalePrice)
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data=as.matrix(test_xgb))

params <- list(objective="reg:squarederror", max_depth=4, eta=0.1)
xgb_model <- xgb.train(params=params, data=dtrain, nrounds=100)
pred_xgb <- predict(xgb_model, dtest)

# 8. Submission final
best_model <- rf_fit   # cámbialo según el menor RMSE
best_pred  <- predict(best_model, newdata=test)

submission <- data.frame(Id=test$Id, SalePrice=best_pred)
write.csv(submission, "submission_final.csv", row.names=FALSE)

submission_xgb <- data.frame(Id=test$Id, SalePrice=pred_xgb)
write.csv(submission_xgb, "submission_xgb.csv", row.names=FALSE)


# Final
```


```{r}

# Stacking manual

# Predicciones en train
pred_rf_train     <- predict(rf_fit, newdata=train)
pred_glmnet_train <- predict(glmnet_fit, newdata=train)
pred_xgb_train    <- predict(xgb_model, newdata=dtrain)

stack_train <- data.frame(
  SalePrice = train$SalePrice,
  RF = pred_rf_train,
  GLMNET = pred_glmnet_train,
  XGB = pred_xgb_train
)

# Meta-modelo lineal
meta_fit <- train(SalePrice ~ ., data=stack_train, method="lm", trControl=ctrl)

# Predicciones en test
pred_rf_test     <- predict(rf_fit, newdata=test)
pred_glmnet_test <- predict(glmnet_fit, newdata=test)
pred_xgb_test    <- predict(xgb_model, newdata=dtest)

stack_test <- data.frame(
  RF = pred_rf_test,
  GLMNET = pred_glmnet_test,
  XGB = pred_xgb_test
)

pred_stack <- predict(meta_fit, newdata=stack_test)

# Submission del ensemble
submission_stack <- data.frame(Id=test$Id, SalePrice=pred_stack)
write.csv(submission_stack, "submission_stack.csv", row.names=FALSE)
```


```{r}
